rules.label: California Accessibility (Public Buildings)
rules.notes_template: California 11B is generally stricter than ADA 2010: e.g., curb ramp slope ≤ 1:12 with 1:48 cross slope, detectable warnings on all curb ramps, larger accessible-parking ratios, additional EV-charging accessibility.
rules.citation: CBC 2022 Chapter 11B – California-specific accessibility standards for publicly funded and publicly accessible buildings.
rules.remediation: Apply Chapter 11B (not just ADA) wherever stricter; coordinate with DSA where state-funded.

rules.label: Class A Roof Coverings (Wildland-Urban Interface)
rules.notes_template: California amendment: Class A roof covering required statewide on new construction; additional Chapter 7A WUI provisions in mapped zones (eaves, vents, exterior walls, decks).
rules.citation: CBC 2022 §1505.1.3 / §701A – California requires Class A roof coverings; Chapter 7A applies in WUI zones.
rules.remediation: Specify Class A roof; in WUI, add ignition-resistant exterior assemblies per Chapter 7A.

rules.label: California Seismic Amendments
rules.notes_template: California-specific seismic provisions modify ASCE 7 application; site-specific ground motion analyses required for soft/liquefiable sites; OSHPD and DSA have separate amendments.
rules.citation: CBC 2022 §1613 / Title 24 amendments – California seismic-design amendments to ASCE 7.
rules.remediation: Use a California-licensed structural engineer; coordinate with DSA/OSHPD as applicable.
